overall.description: GTA V gameplay footage depicting a nighttime walk along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk during a thunderstorm. The player moves past a commercial building with arched windows, overtakes a pedestrian, and approaches a busy intersection with traffic lights and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk next to historic commercial building during thunderstorm

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the wet street to the left
bright lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds overhead
player overtakes a pedestrian walking on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk beside a commercial building with arched windows

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress and hat walking ahead, then overtaken by player
yellow taxi cab driving along the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: two-story building with arched doorways, white facade with dark brick trim, illuminated entrance
tall palm trees lining the street median, swaying in the storm wind
black cast-iron street lamp post with warm light glowing
dark asphalt street glistening with rain water and reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a rain-soaked city sidewalk at night during a heavy thunderstorm. To the right stands a white commercial building with arched windows, while palm trees and street lamps line the left side. A yellow taxi passes on the wet street, and lightning periodically flashes overhead. The player overtakes a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: commercial building ends and view opens up to wide street intersection
vehicles stopped at red traffic light at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop at the street corner to observe the intersection and oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: dark sedan parked at the curb near the intersection corner

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt
overhead traffic signals showing red lights hanging above the intersection
large brightly lit billboard mounted high above the street in the distance
bright yellow fire hydrant positioned at the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the commercial block where the sidewalk opens into a wide city intersection. The white building falls away to reveal a crosswalk, traffic lights, and a large illuminated billboard in the distance. Rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on the wet pavement. The player pauses at the corner near a yellow fire hydrant, observing vehicles waiting at the red light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, illuminated city intersection. It begins beside a white commercial building with arched windows, moving past palm trees and street lamps as lightning flashes across the dark sky and a yellow taxi glides through the rain. As the camera overtakes a pedestrian, the perspective pushes forward through the heavy downpour, with the wet pavement reflecting the surrounding city lights. The scene then expands as the commercial block ends, revealing a broad crosswalk and a large illuminated billboard in the distance. Finally, the movement slows to a pause at the corner by a yellow fire hydrant, looking out over vehicles idling at a red light.
